title: Backported Dungeon Earth
description: Backports new mob variants and also adds in variants from Minecraft Earth and Minecraft Dungeons
body:
This resource pack uses random entity textures to backport future mob variants and add in variants from Minecraft Earth and Minecraft Dungeons.

# Full list of added mob variants:
## Chicken
- Future (Warm and Cold)
- Earth (Amber, Bronzed, Gold Crested, Midnight, Skewbald, Stormy, Cluckshroom & Fancy)
- Dungeons (Duck)
## Cow
- Future (Warm and Cold)
- Earth (Albino, Ashen, Cookie, Cream, Dairy, Pinto, Sunset, Umbra, Wooly, Moobloom, Moolip)
## Sheep
- Earth (Flecked, Fuzzy, Inky, Long Nose, Patched, Rocky, Horned, Rainbow)
## Pig
- Future (Warm and Cold)
- Earth (Mottled, Pale, Piebald, Pink-Footed, Sooty, Spotted, Muddy, Dried Muddy)
## Rabbit
- Earth (Bold Striped, Freckled, Harlequin, Muddy Foot, Vested, Jumbo)
## Cat
- Earth (Dyed)
## Llama
- Earth (Jolly)
## Slime
- Earth (Tropical) NOTE: Just a blue slime for now, can't do animated entity textures yet
## Parrot
- Dungeons (Golden)
## Skeleton
- Dungeons (Mossy, all 3 Sunken tiers)
## Zombie
- Earth (Bouldering, Lobber)
- Dungeons (Frozen, Jungle)
## Spider
- Earth (Bone)
## Wolf
- Earth (Skeleton)
## Witch
- Earth (Viler)

Location of all variants is in the included mobs.txt file (some can't spawn naturally and can only be renamed, like the moobloom or skeleton wolf)

# Issues
If theres any issues just DM me on discord @snowman_4
